scripts.dev: concurrently -k --names "server,web" --prefix "[{name}]" "node apps/server/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs watch apps/server/src/app.ts" "npm run dev --workspace apps/web -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix apps/server && npm run build --prefix apps/web
